title: abutilon schinzii
intro: Abutilon schinzii, also known as the African abutilon or hairy abutilon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Abutilon schinzii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and a treatment for stomach issues. Abutilon schinzii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
